Source2Vault Workspace

Healthcare Data Vault Generator

Load healthcare source metadata, classify PHI, infer business keys and relationships, and export Snowflake dbt Data Vault 2.0 files.

10
Business Keys
Hub candidates with hash keys
10
Relationships
Link candidates inferred
10
Satellites
Incremental hashdiff history
13
PHI / PII Fields
Isolated for governance
Source Tables
9 tables
Column Classification
patient_id
varchar
96%
confidence
BUSINESS KEY

Column matches the table grain and healthcare domain key naming.

patient_mrn
varchar
93%
confidence
BUSINESS KEYPHI

Column matches the table grain and healthcare domain key naming.

ssn
varchar
93%
confidence

Healthcare PHI/PII rule matched this column name or description.

confidence

Defaulted to descriptive satellite attribute for Data Vault history tracking.

state
varchar

confidence
DESCRIPTIVE ATTRIBUTE

zip_code
varchar
93%
confidence
PHIPHI

Healthcare PHI/PII rule matched this column name or description.

patient_status
varchar
82%
confidence
STATUS

Low-cardinality naming pattern suggests lifecycle or classification attribute.

updated_at
timestamp
91%
confidence
AUDIT FIELD

Name matches common audit timestamp pattern.

Recommended Data Vault Model

Deterministic Data Vault 2.0 recommendations with hash keys, hashdiffs, PHI satellites, and Snowflake dbt output.

Hub
hub_patient
patients
Hub
hub_encounter
encounters
Hub
hub_provider
providers
Hub
hub_department
departments
Hub
hub_claim
claims
Hub
hub_claim_line
claim_lines
Hub
hub_diagnosis
diagnoses
Hub
hub_procedure
procedures
Hub
hub_payer
payers
Link
link_patient_encounter
encounters, patients
Link
link_provider_encounter
encounters, providers
Link
link_department_encounter
encounters, departments
Link
link_department_provider
providers, departments
Link
link_patient_claim
claims, patients
Link
link_encounter_claim
claims, encounters
Link
link_payer_claim
claims, payers
Link
link_claim_claim_line
claim_lines, claims
Link
link_diagnosis_claim_line
claim_lines, diagnoses
Hub = hash keyLink = relationshipSatellite = hashdiff history
Recommended Hubs
  • hub_patient
  • hub_encounter
  • hub_provider
  • hub_department
  • hub_claim
  • hub_claim_line
  • hub_diagnosis
  • hub_procedure
Recommended Links
  • link_patient_encounter
  • link_provider_encounter
  • link_department_encounter
  • link_department_provider
  • link_patient_claim
  • link_encounter_claim
  • link_payer_claim
  • link_claim_claim_line
Governance Strategy
  • PHI fields isolated into *_phi satellites
  • Satellites use incremental hashdiff tracking
  • record_source and load_datetime preserved
Reporting Layer

BI-ready dimensions, facts, and metrics generated from the reviewed Data Vault model while excluding PHI by default.

Dimensions
9
  • dim_patient
    3 safe attributes
  • dim_encounter
    3 safe attributes
  • dim_provider
    3 safe attributes
  • dim_department
    2 safe attributes
  • dim_claim
    1 safe attributes
  • dim_claim_line
    0 safe attributes
Facts
4
  • fact_patient
    0 measures, 1 dates
  • fact_encounter
    1 measures, 1 dates
  • fact_claim
    3 measures, 0 dates
  • fact_claim_line
    1 measures, 0 dates
Metrics
16
  • Patient Count
    count(patient_hk)
  • Encounter Count
    count(encounter_hk)
  • Total Discharge Datetime
    sum(discharge_datetime)
  • Average Discharge Datetime
    avg(discharge_datetime)
  • Claim Count
    count(claim_hk)
  • Total Total Charge Amount
    sum(total_charge_amount)
PHI Excluded
13
  • patients.patient_mrn
  • patients.ssn
  • patients.date_of_birth
  • patients.email
  • patients.phone
  • patients.address_line_1
Generated dbt Project

57 Snowflake/dbt files ready for export.

name: source2vault_healthcare
version: 1.0.0
config-version: 2
profile: source2vault_healthcare

model-paths: ["models"]
macro-paths: ["macros"]

models:
  source2vault_healthcare:
    staging:
      +schema: staging
      +materialized: view
    vault:
      +schema: vault
    marts:
      +schema: marts
      +materialized: view
